children.heading: Program authorized
children.label: a Program authorized
children.text: The Secretary shall provide grants and related assistance to Native American-serving, nontribal institutions to enable such institutions to improve and expand their capacity to serve Native Americans and low-income individuals.

children.heading: Native American
children.label: 1 Native American
children.text: The term “Native American” means an individual who is of a tribe, people, or culture that is indigenous to the United States.

children.label: A
children.text: is an eligible institution under ;section 1058(b) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: has an enrollment of undergraduate students that is not less than 10 percent Native American students; and

children.label: C
children.text: is not a Tribal College or University (as defined in ).section 1059c of this title

children.heading: Types of activities authorized
children.label: 1 Types of activities authorized
children.text: Grants awarded under this section shall be used by Native American-serving, nontribal institutions to assist such institutions to plan, develop, undertake, and carry out activities to improve and expand such institutions’ capacity to serve Native Americans and low-income individuals.

children.label: A
children.text: the purchase, rental, or lease of scientific or laboratory equipment for educational purposes, including instructional and research purposes;

children.label: B
children.text: renovation and improvement in classroom, library, laboratory, and other instructional facilities;

children.label: C
children.text: support of faculty exchanges, and faculty development and faculty fellowships to assist faculty in attaining advanced degrees in the faculty’s field of instruction;

children.label: D
children.text: curriculum development and academic instruction;

children.label: E
children.text: the purchase of library books, periodicals, microfilm, and other educational materials;

children.label: F
children.text: funds and administrative management, and acquisition of equipment for use in strengthening funds management;

children.label: G
children.text: the joint use of facilities such as laboratories and libraries;

children.label: H
children.text: academic tutoring and counseling programs and student support services; and

children.label: I
children.text: education or counseling services designed to improve the financial and economic literacy of students or the students’ families.

children.heading: Institutional eligibility
children.label: 1 Institutional eligibility
children.text: A Native American-serving, nontribal institution desiring to receive assistance under this section shall submit to the Secretary such enrollment data as may be necessary to demonstrate that the institution is a Native American-serving, nontribal institution, along with such other information and data as the Secretary may reasonably require.

children.heading: Authority to submit applications
children.label: A Authority to submit applications
children.text: Any institution that is determined by the Secretary to be a Native American-serving, nontribal institution may submit an application for assistance under this section to the Secretary.

children.heading: Simplified and streamlined format
children.label: B Simplified and streamlined format
children.text: The Secretary shall, to the extent possible, continue to prescribe a simplified and streamlined format for applications under this section that takes into account the limited number of institutions that are eligible for assistance under this section.

children.label: i
children.text: a five-year plan for improving the assistance provided by the Native American-serving, nontribal institution to Native Americans and low-income individuals; and

children.label: ii
children.text: such other information and assurances as the Secretary may reasonably require.

children.heading: Eligibility
children.label: A Eligibility
children.text: No Native American-serving, nontribal institution that receives funds under this section shall concurrently receive funds under any other provision of this part, part B, or part A of subchapter V.

children.heading: Exemption
children.label: B Exemption
children.text: shall not apply to institutions that are eligible to receive funds under this section.Section 1059(d) of this title

children.heading: Distribution
children.label: C Distribution
children.text: In awarding grants under this section, the Secretary shall, to the extent possible and consistent with the competitive process under which such grants are awarded, ensure maximum and equitable distribution among all eligible institutions.

children.heading: Minimum grant amount
children.label: D Minimum grant amount
children.text: The minimum amount of a grant under this section shall be $200,000.
